summary: Create Company Inspection Template Item Reference
description: Creates a Company Inspection Template Item Reference for a specified Checklist Template Item.

parameters.name: inspection_template_id
parameters.description: The ID of the Company Inspection Template

template_id.description: ID of the associated Company Inspection Template

item_id.description: ID of the associated Company Inspection Template Item

payload.description: Contains specific attributes depending on the type of Reference

type.description: Company Inspection Template Item Reference Type

created_at.description: Time the Company Inspection Template Item Reference was created

updated_at.description: Time the Company Inspection Template Item Reference was updated

item_id.description: ID of the associated Company Inspection Template Item

type.description: Company Inspection Template Item Reference Type

payload.description: To upload an attachment you must upload the entire payload as `multipart/form-data` content-type

attachment.description:
Reference Attachment.
To upload an attachment you must upload the entire payload as `multipart/form-data` content-type
with the `attachment` file.
